title: MUSIC VIDEO RENDER C — Sara+Eva Tomorrow's Adventure twilight duo
reuseAssetNote: ONE 10s render, paired with Suno song 'Tomorrows Adventure.mp3' via loopVideoWithSong.mjs to fill the 60s music block.
prompt: Wide front-facing music-video shot — designed sunset gradient backdrop. SKY: deep coral pink at the top fading down through orange, gold, and finally a soft lavender-blue at the bottom, with tiny twinkling stars beginning to appear at the top edge. GROUND: stylized silhouette dune line at the bottom of the frame. NO real beach, NO real horizon, NO scene clutter, NO logos. @Sara on the LEFT and @Eva on the RIGHT stand side-by-side facing the camera, both grinning warmly in the golden-hour glow. Sara holds a closed notebook in both hands. Eva holds a tiny battery flashlight pointing upward and slowly turning on / off in rhythm. STRICT ANATOMY: each girl has EXACTLY 2 arms, EXACTLY 2 hands — both hands always holding their notebook / flashlight prop. They perform a gentle dreamy duo loop — LOWER BODY + HEAD only since hands are occupied: gentle hip-sway right, gentle hip-sway left, knees bend slightly, head bobs softly side-to-side, both girls take a small step toward each other and lean in, then step back. As they sway, more tiny stars appear in the gradient sky behind them. Movements are RHYTHMIC and LOOPABLE — clean cycle: sway → sway → step-in-lean → step-back → return. Camera locked, head-on, kid-eye-level. Soft warm sunset rim-light from the right. Sara and Eva hum and sing along generically — no specific dialogue, no lip-sync to any words. The shot is designed to LOOP cleanly. No audible speech, no music — silent render.
